description.value:
Prerequisite: Any 2 meta-Chakra feats, Chakra Pool 40, Chakra Control 12 ranks.

Benefit: When applied to a Fuinjutsu, Genjutsu or Ninjutsu technique, increase all of its random variable, numerical values by 50%. Weapon damage and opposed rolls are unaffected. Increase the Perform Requirements by 3, and the Chakra Cost by 1 per Rank of the technique.

Special: An Empowered technique cannot be enhanced by other meta-Chakra feats.
